tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c (5.9%), suggesting possible prediabetes, though current glucose is normal. Total CO₂ is slightly low, which may indicate mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Platelet mean volume and distribution width are elevated, possibly reflecting increased platelet turnover or activation. All other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and blood counts, are within normal limits. Clinical correlation is recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: Conan Doyle Medical Centre
